hooks.command:
mkdir -p "$HOME/.claude/commands"; shim="$HOME/.claude/commands/masterplan.md"; if [ ! -e "$shim" ] || [ -L "$shim" ] || grep -q 'You are the \*\*orchestrator\*\* for a brainstorm' "$shim" 2>/dev/null; then [ -L "$shim" ] && unlink "$shim"; { printf '%s
' '---'; printf '%s
' 'description: "Delegate to the installed superpowers-masterplan plugin."'; printf '%s
' '---'; printf '%s
' '<!-- masterplan-shim: v3 -->'; printf '%s
' '/superpowers-masterplan:masterplan $ARGUMENTS'; } > "$shim"; fi
